data.name: Eranium Fabric
data.notes:
We are the new-generation connectivity partner, fully privately owned and funded. We have built a next-generation connectivity fabric across major datacenters in Amsterdam and Frankfurt. [Read more](https://www.eranium.io/about) about our initiative.

We also operate [AS35133](https://bgp.tools/as/35133) and the [ERA-IX](https://www.era-ix.com/) internet exchange platform.

data.name: Telehouse AD
data.notes:
Transmission services between Amsterdam, Bratislava, Bucharest, Budapest, Frankfurt, Milano, Paris and Sofia. Infrastructure supported: 10GE, 40GE and 100GE. Automatic protection path switching. Quad-protected backbone between key locations. 

Internet access and Eurotransit services through an extensive set of Tier 1 upstreams, peering partners and IX platforms. Congestion-free environment, lowest possible latency, diverse routing options and complete backbone control are immediately available to all customers at no extra costs. 

Complete portfolio of transmission and IP services in Bulgaria through the most dense DWDM network operating over own cables and IRU agreements. 

Proud Gold Verified Peering Provider of Google with multiple interconnections in Amsterdam, Frankfurt, Milano, Sofia.

data.name: Orange Wholesale International - EVPL
data.notes:
[Orange Wholesale International](https://wholesale.orange.com/international/) is the International Wholesale division of Orange Group. 
We offer [a network of global connectivity](https://wholesale.orange.com/international/en/our-networks/orange-global-networks.html) via 40 submarine cables, stretching 450,000km and an extensive system of +250 PoPs and terrestrial links. We have a strong footprint in Europe, USA, Africa, Middle East and Asia.

We provide connectivity solutions with [Ethernet MPLS POP to POP/Last Mile/Cloud Connectivity](https://wholesale.orange.com/international/en/our-solutions/bandwidth/ethernet-services-evpl.html) from 2 Mbit/s to 10 Gbit/s.

Our EVPL service is certified MEF 3.0 : Eligibility / Quotation / Ordering can be perform with our [API MEF LSO SONATA](https://developer.orange.com/apis/evpl-online) or Web Portal.

For more information, [contact us](https://wholesale.orange.com/international/en/contact-us.html) !

data.org_name: South Dakota Network dba SDN Communications
data.name: SDN Communications
Digital Edge Tokyo Cross Link Service
data.notes:
Digital Edge Tokyo data centers are interconnected with our Cross Link (tm) product, providing high-speed, high-density, low-cost SDN driven metro connectivity service among Digital Edge data centers and other strategic locations within the same metro, creating a seamless digital fabric that ties together ecosystems for our partners and customers. Connectivity options are at the heart of what we do, and we strive to provide the most efficient and cost-effective data center interconnect service to our colocation customers. Moreover, it creates a smooth and economical path for customers who need to expand into multiple Digital Edge data centers in the same metro.

In addition to the Downtown campus, we also have a POP at the Marunouchi Direct Access ODA2 data center for access to the Ohtemachi area

data.name: Digital Edge Seoul Cross Link Service
data.notes:

Connectivity options are at the heart of what we do, and we strive to provide the most efficient and cost-effective data center interconnect service to our colocation customers. Moreover, it creates a smooth and economical path for customers who need to expand into multiple Digital Edge data centers in the same metro.

Our Seoul Data Centers are interconnected with the KINX Dogok and LG CNS Gasan for carrier access.

data.name: CBN Clean Pipe
data.notes: CBN Clean Pipe provides dedicated private connectivity with guaranteed full bandwidth and low latency between customer sites and the provider network. Available in point-to-point and point-to-multipoint options, it ensures reliable, exclusive performance for multi-content delivery. The service supports Dark Fiber, DWDM, MPLS, Metro Ethernet, Global Ethernet, and Cloud Connect to meet customer needs and budgets.

data.name: Macarne
data.notes:
# Macarne AS64289 Network Overview

**Macarne AS64289** is renowned for being one of the best interconnected networks, offering exceptional IP transit and IP transportation services across the USA, Asia, and Europe. Their comprehensive infrastructure supports a range of global connectivity needs. Additionally, Macarne extends its expertise by providing global **colocation**, **cloud services**, and **bare metal solutions** tailored to meet custom business requirements.

data.name: JR West Optical Network(JRWON)
data.notes:
If there is anything we can help you with, please do not hesitate to contact us.

[Email] info@jrw-hikari.net

Since its establishment in July 2021, JRWON has been supporting customers’ network construction
with high quality, reliable, and convenient optical fiber installed along JR West’s Sanyo Shinkansen
Line and conventional lines in western Japan area.
In addition, the Ethernet leased line service, which utilizes the optical fiber and WDM facilities on the Sanyo Shinkansen, connects bases between Osaka and Fukuoka and supports customer communications with two options: 10 Gbps and 100 Gbps.

data.name: Hanshin Cable Engineering Co.,Ltd.
data.notes: Hanshin Cable Engineering has been providing reliable dark fiber services using railway routes since 2002. Our own fiber optics, laid along railway tracks, connect to major data centers in Japan. The strengths of railway-laid routes include low accident risk, minimal relocation disruptions, and high communication quality due to the short distances between endpoints. We also carry out interconnections with various railway companies’ optics. For any inquiries, please contact us at "hikari@hce.hanshin.co.jp".
